notes: Core loop exists but enemies are plain colored rectangles with no sprite art, formation is too small (4 columns only vs Galaga's 10), enemy dive AI is rudimentary and often returns immediately, no tractor beam/capture mechanic, shooting feels limited, and overall the game barely resembles Galaga beyond the concept.
Basic implementation using colored squares; features homing enemies that teleport back to formation, broken missile horizontal movement, and missing capture mechanics.

The build runs and basic shooting/movement work, but it is a very simplified Galaga with crude rectangle graphics, missing hallmark mechanics, questionable enemy/missile behavior, and a likely bug where missile horizontal velocity is never applied.
